req.title: System-Admin deletes onboarding-task
req.statement: An authenticated system-admin shall be able to delete a onboarding-task through the REST API. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

tests.name: naive_case

doc._raw_response:
Here are comprehensive pytest tests for the onboarding-task deletion requirement:

```python
"""
Tests for DELETE /onboarding-tasks/{task_id} endpoint.

Requirement: An authenticated system-admin shall be able to delete an
onboarding-task through the REST API. Mandatory fields must be validated
and an audit record must be written on success.
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from uuid import uuid4
from datetime import datetime, timezone

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

VALID_TASK_ID = str(uuid4())
NONEXISTENT_TASK_ID = str(uuid4())
INVALID_TASK_ID = "not-a-valid-uuid"

SYSTEM_ADMIN_TOKEN = "Bearer valid-system-admin-token"
NON_ADMIN_TOKEN = "Bearer valid-non-admin-token"
EXPIRED_TOKEN = "Bearer expired-token"
MALFORMED_TOKEN = "this-is-not-a-bearer-token"

SAMPLE_ONBOARDING_TASK = {
    "id": VALID_TASK_ID,
    "title": "Complete security training",
    "description": "Finish the mandatory security awareness training.",
    "assignee_id": str(uuid4()),
    "due_date": "2024-12-31",
    "status": "pending",
    "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
}

SAMPLE_SYSTEM_ADMIN = {
    "id": str(uuid4()),
    "username": "admin_user",
    "role": "system-admin",
}


@pytest.fixture
def client(app):
    """Return a test client for the Flask/FastAPI application."""
    return app.test_client()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_task_repository():
    """Mock the onboarding-task data-access layer."""
    with patch("app.repositories.onboarding_task_repository") as mock_repo:
        mock_repo.get_by_id.return_value = SAMPLE_ONBOARDING_TASK
        mock_repo.delete.return_value = True
        yield mock_repo


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_service():
    """Mock the audit-logging service."""
    with patch("app.services.audit_service") as mock_audit:
        mock_audit.write.r

Here are comprehensive pytest tests for the onboarding-task deletion requirement:

```python
"""
Tests for DELETE /onboarding-tasks/{task_id} endpoint.

Requirement: An authenticated system-admin shall be able to delete an
onboarding-task through the REST API. Mandatory fields must be validated
and an audit record must be written on success.
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from uuid import uuid4
from datetime import datetime, timezone

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

VALID_TASK_ID = str(uuid4())
NONEXISTENT_TASK_ID = str(uuid4())
INVALID_TASK_ID = "not-a-valid-uuid"

SYSTEM_ADMIN_TOKEN = "Bearer valid-system-admin-token"
NON_ADMIN_TOKEN = "Bearer valid-non-admin-token"
EXPIRED_TOKEN = "Bearer expired-token"
MALFORMED_TOKEN = "this-is-not-a-bearer-token"

SAMPLE_ONBOARDING_TASK = {
    "id": VALID_TASK_ID,
    "title": "Complete security training",
    "description": "Finish the mandatory security awareness training.",
    "assignee_id": str(uuid4()),
    "due_date": "2024-12-31",
    "status": "pending",
    "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
}

SAMPLE_SYSTEM_ADMIN = {
    "id": str(uuid4()),
    "username": "admin_user",
    "role": "system-admin",
}


@pytest.fixture
def client(app):
    """Return a test client for the Flask/FastAPI application."""
    return app.test_client()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_task_repository():
    """Mock the onboarding-task data-access layer."""
    with patch("app.repositories.onboarding_task_repository") as mock_repo:
        mock_repo.get_by_id.return_value = SAMPLE_ONBOARDING_TASK
        mock_repo.delete.return_value = True
        yield mock_repo


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_service():
    """Mock the audit-logging service."""
    with patch("app.services.audit_service") as mock_audit:
        mock_audit.write.return_value = True
        yield mock_audit


@pytest.fixture
def mock_auth_service():
    """Mock the authentication / authorisation service."""
    with patch("app.services.auth_service") as mock_auth:
        mock_auth.decode_token.return_value = SAMPLE_SYSTEM_ADMIN
        mock_auth.is_system_admin.return_value = True
        yield mock_auth


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def delete_task(client, task_id, token=SYSTEM_ADMIN_TOKEN, **kwargs):
    """Convenience wrapper for the DELETE endpoint."""
    headers = {"Authorization": token}
    headers.update(kwargs.pop("extra_headers", {}))
    return client.delete(f"/api/v1/onboarding-tasks/{task_id}", headers=headers, **kwargs)


# ===========================================================================
# 1. Authentication Tests
# ===========================================================================

class TestAuthentication:
    """The request must carry a valid, non-expired credential."""

    def test_missing_authorization_header_returns_401(
        self, client, mock_task_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        response = client.delete(f"/api/v1/onboarding-tasks/{VALID_TASK_ID}")
        assert response.status_code == 401

    def test_malformed_token_returns_401(
        self, client, mock_task_repository, mock_audit_service
    ):
        response = delete_task(client, VALID_TASK_ID, token=MALFORMED_TOKEN)
        assert response.status_code == 401

    def test_expired_token_returns_401(
        self, client, mock_task_repository, mock_audit_service, mock_auth_service
    ):
        mock_auth_service.decode_token.side_effect = TokenExpiredError("Token expired")
        response = delete_task(client, VALID_TASK_ID, token=EXPIRED_TOKEN)
        assert response.status_code == 401

    def test_invalid_signature_token_returns_401(
        self, client, mock_task_r
